author: danyim
description: Command palette actions to manage frontmatter publish and visibility properties, with a copy-URL command for published pages. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: danyim
manifest.description: Command palette actions to manage frontmatter publish and visibility properties, with a copy-URL command for published pages.
manifest.name: Custom Publish

name: Custom Publish

releases.author: danyim
releases.description:
Initial release of Custom Publish.

## Features

- **Publish / Unpublish / Toggle** commands to manage frontmatter publish property
- **Toggle visibility** command for private/public control
- **Copy published page URL** with configurable URL template and slug style (kebab-case, Title-Kebab-Case, TitleCase, camelCase)
- All property keys and URL template are configurable in settings
